task_text: agent-33-birthday-v0-1-with-cli-write-design — design doc for option C v0.1: exact code-level specs for CustomerBirthday + CustomerBirthdayStore + LoyaltyConfig + CustomerBirthdayRecorded + BriefSection extension at schemas.py with file:line insertion points; _aggregate_birthdays + _render_birthdays helpers in send-daily-brief; template patch; record-customer-birthday CLI script mirroring create-catering-lead's lock+atomic-write pattern; 10 test cases (6 unit + 4 subprocess).
